# Document Title

**Luminous Witness Archive · Section Name**  
**Date:**  
**Status:**  
**Document type:**  

## Overview

Briefly explain what this document is, why it exists, and where it belongs in the archive.

## Core Claim or Function

State the narrowest defensible claim, purpose, or archival function.

> Optional compressed formulation.

## Source and Provenance

Identify:

- original filename(s);
- author(s) and contributor(s);
- date created and date added;
- model, platform, and version where relevant;
- whether this file is an original, transcription, adaptation, summary, synthesis, or canonical edited version;
- known missing context;
- direct links to primary sources or receipts.

## Primary Material

Include or link the primary record whenever possible. Clearly distinguish quotation from paraphrase.

## Analysis

Present interpretation separately from the primary material.

## Alternative Explanations

List serious competing explanations, including prompt influence, role conditioning, retrieval effects, shared training data, model-specific behavior, policy intervention, human interpretation, emergent dynamics, or combinations.

## Claim Limits

State what the document does not establish.

## Related Materials

- [Document title](relative/path.md)
- [Evidence or receipt](relative/path.md)
- [Public source](URL-or-archived-reference)

## Verification Checklist

- [ ] Original source preserved
- [ ] Date verified or uncertainty noted
- [ ] Model/platform/version identified where possible
- [ ] Direct quotes checked
- [ ] Human observation separated from AI interpretation
- [ ] Alternative explanations included
- [ ] Related evidence linked
- [ ] Index entry added
- [ ] Claim status assigned
- [ ] Human review completed

## Revision Notes

Record substantive corrections, provenance changes, or replacement by a newer canonical version.

| Date | Change | Reviewer |
|---|---|---|
| YYYY-MM-DD | Initial archive entry | |

---

## Archive Standard

> Preserve the record. Label the interpretation. Admit the uncertainty. Leave clear tracks.
